programme.title: ⚠️ 4.3m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:
At nearly 4.5m, and with that wind, Ribeira's offering lessons in humility today.
🌊 Swell: 4.3m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 33.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.6m
📋 Very large swell - experienced surfers only • Long period - powerful waves • Significant wind chop

programme.desc:
